description: React component for a login page with client-side validation, UI state management, and API integration for user authentication.

methods.name: validateForm
methods.description: Validates email and password fields; sets inline error messages; returns boolean for form validity.

methods.name: clearFieldError
methods.description: Clears error message for specific field upon user input.

methods.name: handleSubmit
methods.description: Handles form submission, performs validation, API call, state updates, and redirection on success.
